## Walkthrough

This pull request pins GitHub Actions to specific commit SHAs across multiple workflow files (setup-playwright, setup-pnpm, code-quality, cosmos-pages, and e2e-tests) to replace floating version references. The package.json is updated with dependency version bumps including better-upload, better-auth, tanstack/react-start, zod, and dev tools like oxfmt, oxlint, and playwright. The `@react-email/components` dependency is removed, and email component imports are migrated from `@react-email/components` to react-email. Additional changes include adding a pnpm.overrides entry for body-parser and adjusting jscpd ignore patterns.

</details>

<!-- walkthrough_end -->

üü¢ **Low** `setup-playwright/action.yml:15` The pinned commit `27d5ce7f107fe9357f9df03efb73ab90386fccae` is labeled as `# v5.0.5`, but no such release exists ‚Äî the latest released version is `v5.0.4` (commit `668228422ae6a00e4ad889ee87cd7109ec5666a7`). The pinned hash is an unreleased merge commit from the `main` branch, so the comment misleads auditors into believing this is a validated release. Consider pinning to the actual `v5.0.4` release commit and updating the comment, or if unreleased code is intentional, document why this specific commit is required. ```suggestion uses: actions/cache@668228422ae6a00e4ad889ee87cd7109ec5666a7 # v5.0.4 ```

The pinned hash is an unreleased merge commit from the `main` branch, so the comment misleads auditors into believing this is a validated release. Consider pinning to the actual `v5.0.4` release commit and updating the comment, or if unreleased code is intentional, document why this specific commit is required. ```

## Code Review

This pull request updates several dependencies, including better-auth, zod, and playwright, and migrates email imports from @react-email/components to the react-email package. It also pins GitHub Actions to specific commit hashes and adds a body-parser override in package.json. Feedback was provided to pin the new react-email dependency to an exact version to maintain consistency with the project's dependency management strategy.

![medium](https://www.gstatic.com/codereviewagent/medium-priority.svg)

The `react-email` dependency is added with a caret (`^`) version range, while most other core dependencies in this project (like `better-auth`, `zod`, and `nitro`) are pinned to exact versions. To maintain consistency with the project's dependency management strategy and ensure reproducible builds, it is recommended to pin this to an exact version.

```suggestion
    "react-email": "6.0.8",
```

**No issues found** across 10 files
